title: anthocarapa balansana
intro: Anthocarapa balansana, also known as the Balansa tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to New Guinea and surrounding islands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Anthocarapa balansana include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
